title: Stargate Journey
description: Journey through the Stargate to another world. In Minecraft!
body:
Let's add Stargates to Minecraft... in a different way. The Stargate is an ancient (pun intended) device, which can't be crafted, but rather must be found in the world. It allows for instantaneous travel between Planets (Dimensions). But what's the point of having a Stargate, if you can't craft more? Well, there isn't just the Stargate, beyond it lie multiple worlds just waiting to be discovered. And who knows, maybe you'll one day be able to make your own Stargates as well...

Please note that this project is very much work in progress: **Features may be buggy, unfinished or unobtainable in Survival. Please back your worlds up properly.**

For info and troubleshooting, check out the [wiki](https://povstalec.github.io/StargateJourney/)

If you're looking for an RPG experience involving Stargates, consider checking out [Colony:Exodus to the stars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/colony-exodus-to-the-stars) modpack.
If you prefer a more tech and quest focused experience, consider checking out [Stargate: ReLeveled](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/stargate-releveled) modpack.


If pixelated Stargates aren't your vibe, check out [Just Stargate Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jsg), they have amazing models for everything there and also have 1.12.2 versions!  
If you prefer Fabric, Stargate Journey might get a Fabric port eventually, but until then you can check out [STARGATE](https://modrinth.com/mod/amble-stargate), they have a nice Minecraft-themed Fabric mod that's still fairly early in development!

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/VDSqzdBqRd) where you can ask for help, get more info about the mod and watch its creator go insane because he can't figure out why that one bug keeps on appearing over and over again... Seriously, why does Minecraft Worldgen make no sense!?
